description:
This quiz assesses proficiency in fundamental data structures such as stacks, lists, and trees, as well as core algorithmic concepts and time‑complexity analysis. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a supportive, instructional tone that guides learners through 20 targeted questions.
Topics: Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithm design, Time complexity, Big O notation
Audience: Students and early‑career developers who have completed introductory programming courses and want to solidify their understanding of data structures and algorithms.
